titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 96: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 96. (A.R. No. 653 of 1963.) KOTTAMAṄGALAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the tiers, northern side of the base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine of the ruined Perumāḷ temple.

Records a gift of three mā of land after getting it freed from taxes by Āchchiyan Bhaṭṭaṉ Chakrapāṇi Śrī-Vāśudēvaṉ, probably a military official (brahmādhirājan) of Peruvaṅgūr for conducting the sacred bath (ekāśītī-tirumañjaṉam -bath with 81 pots of water) and for providing three miḍas of milk offering (pāṟpōṉagam) at the end of tirumañjanam and for carrying out the due procedures in this connection on the sacred day, dvādaśi in the month of Mārgaḻi, to the God in the Rājakēsari-vishṇugriham in Kalār-kkūṟṟam in Maḻa-nāḍu. The temple officials (śrīkāriyam) undertook to carry out this charity perpetually. See the next record No. 97.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu maḻa nāṭṭu kalārkkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu brahmadeyam kirāmaṅkalacceri śrīrājakesari
viṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku mārkaḻit tirudvādaśi nāṉṟu Ekāśiti tirumañcaṉam pukkaruḷi pāṟpoṉaka muṉṟumiṭā Amu
tu ceytaruḷavumakāp peruveṅkūr brahmādhirājaṉākiya Ācciyaṉ bhaṭṭaṉ cakkirapāṇi śrī vāsudevaṉeṉ Iṟaiyiḻittuk kuṭutta nila

māvatu Ikkirāmaṅkalacceri noccik kaṇṇā lāṟṟukku meṟkum kuṇṭu pilāṟṟil ta �ka nilattukku vaṭakkum pālai mallaṉ nilattuk
ku māḻvāruṭaiya nilattukkuk kiḻakkum Ācciyaṉ viṉācakañ centaṉ Atañceykkut teṟkkumāka naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamūṉṟu mā Itu Aṭaippaṭi
Aḷakku nellu 10000 8 1000 Inellāṟ cellumpaṭi tirumuḷaiyaṭṭa tirumuḷaipujattukkum tirumuḷaiyaṭṭu miṭattiṭum pākkiṉukkum Amutu ceyta
ruḷat tiṉpaṇṭattiṉukkum pālikaikku mitaṉ kiḻaṭṭa nellukkum tirukkāppukaṭṭiyaruḷumiṭattiṭum pākkiṉukku mitaṉ kiḻaṭṭa nellukkum kalattiṉ
kiḻaṭṭa nellukkalamum kalaca mūṭappuṭavai muṉṟiṉukkum toraṇac ciṟupuṭavai nālukkum Ācāryya pūcaṉai Oraṇaikkum kalacameṭuppāṉukku puṭavai
Oṉṟum jalapavitra puṭavai 1 m vedikai cūḻa puṭavai 1 m tirumeypūccu naṟuñ cāntiṉukkum nālu tiruppaḷḷittāmattiṉukkum cārttiyaruḷat tiruppa

ri caṭṭam ṉukku citārikkum tirupuṉyāhadekṣaṉaikku māṟṟiṉir koṭu varuvār nālvarkkum teṉ mukkāṇi yum ney Iḍayum pālukkum tayirkkum pañcagavyattiṟkum paladravyatti
ṟku muḷḷiṭṭu poṉ ḷukkup paṉṉiru kala vaṇṇattāl nellu celavāvatākavum meṟpaṭi pāṟpoṉakattukku Arici kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum paruppu kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum
pāl muppattaṟu nāḻiyum caṟkarai yamutum vāḻaippaḻavamutum neyyamutu maṭaik kāyamutum Aṟṟai nāḷāl brāhmaṇar patiṉmaṟkku perāl patiṉāḻiyāka vuṇṇa vaitta nelu mukkāṇi � yumāka
nellu muppatta mum Ineyyāl Ippaṭi candrādityavaṟ celuttuvip pomāṉom śrī kāryyañ ceyvom Itu śrī vaiṣṇavar rakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
